title: Show Diagnostic Failure Feedback
description: When simulation fails, show what each output produced vs expected. Add 'Actual' column to truth table for failed rows.

changes.what: In updateTruthTable(), when results exist and a row fails, add an 'Actual' column showing what the circuit actually produced vs expected.
Style the actual-output column to distinguish it visually from expected

acceptance: When simulation has failures, truth table shows 'Actual' header column(s)
Failed rows show actual output values in red alongside expected values
Passing rows don't need actual column (they match)
Table still looks clean and readable
